name: 3M™ Thermal Transfer Label Material 7291, Matte White Synthetic Paper, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Durable Label Material 7291 is a multi-ply, biaxially-oriented white polypropylene facestock that has no plasticizers, so it resists shrinkage. The combination of this facestock and 3M™ Adhesive P1400, a high performance tackified acrylic, offers good weatherability for product identification labels.
benefits: Multi-ply biaxially-oriented white polypropylene facestock has a consistent caliper to help prevent registration problems on press
Polypropylene-based facestock has no plasticizers, so it resists shrinkage
Range of 3M acrylic adhesives suits the most specific applications
Selection of durable liners makes for efficient die-cutting and other processing

discovery.title: 3M™ Thermal Transfer Label Material 7291, Matte White Synthetic Paper, Roll, Config
